records.name: Welcome to the
records.description: Welcome to the @OpenAI board! https://t.co/V0p2ElxbRe

records.name: Codex for computational chemistry:
records.description: Codex for computational chemistry: https://t.co/TpWHB9nnS8

records.name: Documentary on the OpenAI Dota project will be launched on
records.description: Documentary on the OpenAI Dota project will be launched on https://t.co/8yNjeKhJnh , Friday, Sept 24th at 11a PT. Full-length screening followed by Q&A with the director, Dota community guests, and OpenAI team: https://t.co/XjnlzIAhlD

records.name: We want our AI systems to be aligned with human intentions.
records.description: We want our AI systems to be aligned with human intentions. This is especially important as tasks get more difficult to evaluate. To develop techniques to address this problem, we trained a model to summarize books. https://t.co/NDnUtcjXFX

records.name: We've created an AI system that can summarize books. Matches the quality of human-written summaries
records.description: We've created an AI system that can summarize books. Matches the quality of human-written summaries 5% of the time, and there's lots of room to improve from here. One step towards building AI systems that can reliably perform tasks that are hard for humans to even evaluate. https://t.co/8eSA0GgVhi

records.name: Alice in Wonderland, as summarized by our latest AI system (
records.description: Alice in Wonderland, as summarized by our latest AI system ( https://t.co/Cvh9XhIb0X ): https://t.co/NIiTrCOVfv

records.name: Dota documentary live streaming in 5 mins:
records.description: Dota documentary live streaming in 5 mins: https://t.co/2VSdpxvIuT ! https://t.co/IS2LMOnp0m

records.name: @phemartin
records.description: @phemartin Replay of today's event here: https://t.co/PMiPJELAaJ !
. @Replit is launching an OpenAI-powered feature to explain any JavaScript or Python code: https://t.co/99czWVqfPp

records.name: COBOL -> Python translation with Codex:
records.description: COBOL -> Python translation with Codex: https://t.co/O1MjWs6wts

records.name: We've built an AI system that solves grade school math word problems. Starting to achieve decent acc
records.description: We've built an AI system that solves grade school math word problems. Starting to achieve decent accuracy & represents significant progress on top of GPT-3: https://t.co/pCwfLsdaZP https://t.co/2gCSF7gc6o

records.name: We've trained a system to answer grade-school math problems with double the accuracy of a fine-tuned
records.description: We've trained a system to answer grade-school math problems with double the accuracy of a fine-tuned GPT-3 model. Multistep reasoning is difficult for today's language models. We present a new technique to help. https://t.co/JRXUYZOSg7

records.name: We introduced new safeguards to our API that make it possible to remove the waitlist. Now developers
records.description: We introduced new safeguards to our API that make it possible to remove the waitlist. Now developers can sign up and explore GPT-3 right away. https://t.co/yj0ROcyHzt

records.name: You can now get instant access to our GPT-3 API:
records.description: You can now get instant access to our GPT-3 API: https://t.co/Q6WA2sT7IW

records.name: OpenAI Residency:
records.description: OpenAI Residency: https://t.co/29rhC6LJ6X https://t.co/iZ9Pyhxrqc

records.name: We're excited to announce the OpenAI Residency! This new program offers a pathway to a full-time rol
records.description: We're excited to announce the OpenAI Residency! This new program offers a pathway to a full-time role at OpenAI for researchers and engineers who don't currently focus on AI. The program will focus on recruiting from underrepresented groups in technology. https://t.co/Umq6ObEeeE

records.name: A Codex-powered application that automatically documents your codebase:
records.description: A Codex-powered application that automatically documents your codebase: https://t.co/PnOjOKuZ9a

records.name: Developers can now create a custom version of GPT-3 for their applications with a single command. Fi
records.description: Developers can now create a custom version of GPT-3 for their applications with a single command. Fine-tuning GPT-3 on your data improves performance for many use cases. See results 👇 https://t.co/p67QfwbrEa

records.name: You can now fine-tune GPT-3 on your own data. This vastly increases the accuracy of GPT-3, making it
records.description: You can now fine-tune GPT-3 on your own data. This vastly increases the accuracy of GPT-3, making it reliable for a much wider set of tasks: https://t.co/rhZTvfvOPf https://t.co/17Xv57qHeB
